title: Cuttack schools, colleges to be shut till April 23 for heatwave - The New Indian Express
search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Odisha
full_text:
CUTTACK: The Cuttack administration on Monday ordered the closure of all government, aided and private schools and colleges, and anganwadi centres across the district for three days from April 21 to April 23 in view of the prevailing heatwave condition.
As per the order of the collector and district magistrate, teachers will be required to attend schools and conduct online classes to ensure completion of the syllabus.
All government, aided and private colleges across the district will also remain shut, though the scheduled examination will continue as planned. The anganwadi centres have been instructed to distribute take-home rations instead of cooked meals.
The order further stated that enumerators shall continue the census exercise by adopting heatwave protocol. “The order shall remain in force until further instruction and any violation of this order will be viewed seriously and action will be taken as per rules,” it read.
